prestazioni: Mansory Carbonado GT V12 6.75L N74B68 twin-turbo engine upgrade with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft) paired with a Mansory-specific ECU remap (Stage 3) targeting 750 hp and 850 lb-ft of torque, utilizing a custom Mansory exhaust system with 3.5-inch titanium-coated downpipes and quad 100mm carbon fiber tips

Garrett GT35R turbocharger upgrade with billet compressor wheels, 76mm turbine wheels, and custom Mansory intercooler piping (aluminum mandrel-bent, 3.5-inch diameter) with a PWR Racing front-mount intercooler (1200hp capacity) and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup for crankcase ventilation

Mansory-tuned KW Variant 5 coilover suspension with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and preload), reinforced spherical bearings, and custom spring rates (800 lb/in front, 700 lb/in rear) paired with a Mansory front strut bar (carbon fiber) and a full chassis reinforcement kit (aluminum subframe braces and carbon fiber torque boxes)
estetica: Mansory 'Black Diamond' widebody kit with carbon fiber fenders (extended 50mm front, 70mm rear), custom side skirts, and a rear diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust outlets, all finished in a matte 'Frozen Black' wrap with gloss carbon fiber accents

Mansory 'Carbonado' front fascia with a 3D-printed carbon fiber grille (laser-cut RR emblem), LED matrix headlights with adaptive Mansory 'Ice Blue' DRLs, and a custom Mansory hood with a functional carbon fiber scoop (ducted to the intercooler)

Mansory 'Black Diamond' 24-inch forged alloy wheels (front: 10.5x24 ET25, rear: 12.5x24 ET15) wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (285/30 R24 front, 325/25 R24 rear), paired with Mansory carbon ceramic brake kit (420mm front, 380mm rear) with gold-painted calipers and 'Mansory' laser-engraved logos
